description: Drone manufacturer/model database for skylens enrichment. All OUIs independently verified against IEEE MA-L/MA-M registry via macvendors API (2026-02-06 audit). Field-observed serial prefixes added from RemoteID captures (2026-02-13). Covers consumer, prosumer, enterprise, FPV, agricultural, and military drones.

1581F11.verified: Community: 1581F11V = Phantom 4 Pro V2, confirmed Feb 2026

1581F3Y.verified: DJI FAQ: Air 2S 14-char serial starts with 3YT, confirmed Feb 2026

1581F45.verified: FAA DOC serial range 1581F45T, confirmed Feb 2026

1581F37QB.verified: Community: 37QB = DJI FPV, field detected serial 1581F37QBJ5KBD1024M0 (Feb 2026)

1748.verified: Field detected serial 1748FEV5LTE825351132, Autel EVO via WiFi RemoteID (Feb 2026)

oui_map.84:83:19: Hangzhou Zero Zero Technology / ZeroTech Dobby (drone)
oui_map._removed_62:60:1F: REMOVED: LAA bit set, dead entry
oui_map._removed_ESP32: REMOVED: 18 Espressif OUIs caused massive IoT false positives. ESP drones caught via SSID ^ESP-DRONE
oui_map._removed_GoPro: REMOVED: GoPro Karma discontinued 2018, OUIs now represent cameras only
oui_map._removed_Goertek: REMOVED: Goertek makes earbuds/VR, Tello caught via SSID pattern
